speaker: [player]
text: Dirtus. When exactly are you planning to do the summoning?

speaker: Dirtus
text: Slide six has the calendar. The next Worm Moon window is in three weeks.

speaker: Dirtus
text: It's a real thing. The March full moon. Farmers used to call it that because worms come up through the thawed ground. I looked it up. It's not even something I invented.

speaker: Dirtus
text: I know. I was shocked too. The universe is aligned. Scatha wants this.

speaker: Mawla
text: If the worm moon is real then I have to admit the concept of a worm moon based ritual has a certain logic to it.

speaker: Mawla
text: I'm just noting it has internal consistency.

speaker: Dirtus
text: THANK YOU, Mawla. Internal consistency is the foundation of all good ritual.

speaker: Dirtus
text: So. Three weeks. I'll need everyone present. Including you, [player]. You're new which means you have the freshest worm energy. Uncorrupted by doubt.

speaker: Dirtus
text: Some doubt is fine. Scatha respects intellectual honesty.
